creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226267
update

Proposing patch to update to latest release 3.2.3

This update introduced a new build time dependency on inkscape, used to generate icons during build.

I also added USES desktop-file-utils and shared-mime-info, suggested by poudriere and it looks like they are really needed since the port is installing a deskstop file and a mime info file.
